title: odontarrhena pugiostyla
intro: Odontarrhena pugiostyla, also known as the toothed Rhodiola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Odontarrhena pugiostyla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mental performance and memory, and enhancing mood. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and resilience.
